Very good place to rest for a while and eat something

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar y estirar las piernas, tanto de ida como de vuelta, socios de Aca atención especial, baños, comidas, mesas y sillas al aire libre, restaurante, regalaría, y aire puro, por supuesto estación de servicios YPF, agua para el mate etc.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and stretch your legs, both on the way there and back, special attention for Aca members, restrooms, food, outdoor tables and chairs, restaurant, gift shop, and fresh air, of course YPF service station, water for mate etc.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRZ0piNGhRRRAB

There was a lack of paper, and some cleaning

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para detenerse a estirar las piernas. Su amplio espacio verde y la comodidad de sus mesas al aire libre potencian el descanso necesario para seguir la ruta. Un parador bien surtido, con comidas rápidas y bebidas le agregan valor a este punto tradicional de la autovía 2. #LetsGuide

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop and stretch your legs. Its ample green space and comfortable outdoor tables make for a much-needed rest before continuing your journey. A well-stocked rest stop with fast food and drinks adds to the appeal of this traditional stop on Highway 2. #LetsGuide
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndWF1RGZnEAE
